summary: VCC (Virtual Credit Card) Secure View Feature Testing Complete - All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: Online Odeme tab works, card add form works, card reveal with 3-view limit works. Fixed critical bug: Missing CreditCard import in ReservationDetailModal.jsx.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/pms/reservations/{booking_id}/vcc/status - Check status without consuming view - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/pms/reservations/{booking_id}/vcc/reveal - Reveal card (consumes 1 of 3 views) - PASSED
Backend: 4th reveal attempt returns 403 (view limit reached) - PASSED
Backend: Duplicate card storage returns 409 - PASSED
Backend: Full VCC lifecycle test (store -> status -> reveal x3 -> locked -> delete) - PASSED
Frontend: 'Online Odeme' tab appears in reservation detail modal - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state shown when no card exists - PASSED
Frontend: Card add form works with all fields - PASSED
Frontend: Card saved successfully with masked number display - PASSED
Frontend: Card reveal button with remaining view count - PASSED
Frontend: Revealed card details show full card info - PASSED

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing CreditCard import from lucide-react caused 'CreditCard is not defined' error when opening modal
fixed_bugs.fix: Added CreditCard to the import statement on line 10

critical_code_review_comments: vcc_router.py: Properly implements AES-256-GCM encryption via FieldEncryptionService
vcc_router.py: Atomic view count increment with $lt condition prevents race conditions
vcc_router.py: Card masking shows first 6 and last 4 digits for security
vcc_router.py: Activity logging for audit trail on store/reveal/delete operations
OnlinePaymentTab.jsx: Proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
OnlinePaymentTab.jsx: Confirmation dialog before reveal to warn about view consumption
OnlinePaymentTab.jsx: Visual progress bar and remaining views badge for UX
OnlinePaymentTab.jsx: Locked state message when 3 views exhausted
seed_data_creation: Test VCC cards created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: VCC feature is fully functional. Backend APIs: store, status, reveal (3-view limit), delete all work. Frontend: Online Odeme tab in reservation detail modal works with add form, reveal button, and locked state. The CreditCard import bug was fixed. To test: double-click a booking bar on /reservation-calendar to open modal, then click 'Online Odeme' tab.

verification_summary.vcc_store_api: PASS - Returns 200 with masked card and view_count=0
verification_summary.vcc_status_api: PASS - Returns has_vcc and card info without consuming view
verification_summary.vcc_reveal_api: PASS - Returns decrypted card details and increments view_count
verification_summary.vcc_reveal_limit: PASS - 4th reveal returns 403 with Turkish error message
verification_summary.frontend_add_form: PASS - All fields work (holder, number, expiry, cvv, type)
verification_summary.frontend_card_display: PASS - Shows masked card with view counter
verification_summary.frontend_reveal_button: PASS - Shows remaining views and triggers reveal
verification_summary.frontend_revealed_details: PASS - Shows full card info with hide button
